background.edgeRule: Character must remain fully on non-matte pixels with no spill into matte in core silhouette

generationContract.styleGuide: cel-shaded anime/game illustration, painterly 2.5D, high readability

antiCopyrightConstraints: No direct copying of named IP characters, emblems, signature hairstyles, or costume blueprints from any source material.
Do not use or imply proprietary names as output label text on image.

Avoid one-to-one silhouette reuse from known Solo Leveling frames (especially cape silhouette, facial hair pattern, exact sword geometry, or shadow spawn pattern). Avoid naming conventions directly tied to external IP; use original titles, e.g., 'Crimson Signal Warden' instead of source-character transliterations.
Keep pose language distinct per archetype and variant; no single template pose repeated across all prompts.
Do not include UI, interface chrome, watermark, or on-text credits.
Keep color blocking original: avoid default palette that replicates source-provided character art, while preserving warm-autumn/particle atmosphere cues.
If any output visually crosses similarity threshold against source reference, re-generate by changing three independent attributes (pose, silhouette, materials, and secondary palette accents).

variants.promptEnglish: Original dark-fantasy huntress/warrior in battle-ready human form, narrow-shouldered but strong, layered plate-and-cloth armor, matte iron bracers, narrow steel rapier in one hand and void-thread tether in other, scarred face under a split-bone hood, grounded 3/4 combat stance, isolated on uniform #FF00FF matte, warm-dusk particle sparks around weapon edges, cel-shaded 2.5D anime production art, full-body concept for boss character.

composition.poseReadability: clear weapon silhouette on torso and hands, no overlap
composition.environmentHint: sparse autumn foliage shapes and drifting leaves as depth cues only

negative: no exact replica of source protagonist face/pose
no multiple faces of same model in one frame

retargeting.sourceActionAlignment: pose-per-frame FK + additive FK overlays for cloth and particle attachments
retargetGuidelines: Do not stretch root more than 12% per 10 frames while moving
Keep shoulder-height envelope stable between frames 100-170 for attack states
Avoid shoulder/hip crossing during frame reuse from different variants

validators: silhouetteArea <= no major inversion at loop seam between frame 0 and frame 299
no limb disappears for >2 consecutive keyframes unless intended by action
contactFrameDistance: avoid sudden >150 unit jump at phase boundaries

gateChecks.A: Idle, move, run pose continuity with no clipping (CVSS1)
gateChecks.B: Attack to bighit transition frame-energy monotonic increase
gateChecks.C: Show pose returns to read-friendly facing angle, loop start<=300 compatibility
gateChecks.D: Critical and defence states include full chest/shoulder read markers

sequence.name: Prompt Pack Gate
tasks: Validate all 16 prompt fields are non-empty using schema
Run anti-copyright constraint checklist on prompt text
sequence.acceptance: No prompt contains prohibited IP names, duplicate style block, or out-of-resolution settings.

sequence.name: Concept Batch
tasks: Generate 16 candidates using god-tibo-imagen with this pack
Run visual diff for silhouette uniqueness across 4 variants within an archetype
sequence.acceptance: At least 1 clear pass for each archetype-variant; no magenta spill onto character; magenta matte remains clean

sequence.name: Motion Synthesis
tasks: Map each accepted image concept to action timeline using action window schema above
Create preliminary `*.previs.json` markers for idle→show loop
Export check pass list with action timing
sequence.acceptance: All 11 actions covered within timeline; critical/bighit/die have dedicated impact markers

sequence.name: Blender Ingest
tasks: Apply base rig proxy with matching bone mapping
Build baseline animation strips and pose-level constraints
sequence.acceptance: No armature mismatch errors; root starts at z=0, world scale preserved; frame drift < 1px over loop seam

sequence.name: Motion-Previs QA
tasks: Produce low-res playblast for team review
sequence.acceptance: No major jump at loop points; readability score >= 4/5 from game-qa; output files committed to production artifacts
